\documentclass{standalone}

\usepackage[svgnames]{xcolor}
\usepackage[3d]{luadraw}

\directlua{
  dofile('../../../../products/lua/palettes-hf/LTurqsat1.lua')
}

\begin{document}
\begin{luadraw}{name = LTurqsat1-spectrum}
local PAL      = palLTurqsat1
local NB_CELLS = 256

local WIDTH = 8

local A = Z(-WIDTH / 2, 4)
local HEIGHT = Z(0, -.7)

local g = graph:new{
  window = {
    -WIDTH / 2,
    WIDTH / 2,
    -5, 5
  },
  bbox = false
}

local dl = WIDTH / NB_CELLS

for k = 1, NB_CELLS do
  local color = palette(
    PAL,
    (k - 1) / (NB_CELLS - 1)
  )

  g:Drectangle(
    A,
    A + HEIGHT,
    A + HEIGHT + dl,
    "color=" .. color .. ", fill=" .. color
  )

  A = A + dl
end

g:Drectangle(
  A,
  A + HEIGHT,
  A + HEIGHT - WIDTH,
  "color=black"
)

g:Show()
\end{luadraw}
\end{document}
